ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-07-2023 Continued To Aug-08-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Renee Schaible appeared by zoom for Jonathan Lee (administrator).

Mrs. Schaible apologized to the court stating that this estate is an ancillary estate, that the main estate is in Illinois, that there was a settlement with the ex-wife to quit claim the interest in the San Francisco property and that the ex-wife didn't do that. Mrs. Schaible also stated that it finally happened in August, that the property sold in September, that there are non-resident beneficiaries and that they need clearance from the Franchise Tax Board. In addition, Mrs. Schaible stated that the accountant is working on the tax return, and that she anticipates a six-month timeline. Status on close of estate is continued to August 8, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court informed counsel that either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration needs to be filed one week prior.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-24-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Renne Schaible, via ZOOM, for Jonathan Lee, Petitioner.

The court confirms with counsel that this is a Petition for Ancillary Probate. Counsel provides oral advocacy for the petition and offers clarification regarding the Cook County court procedures regarding the will. The court points to the embossed, clerk's certified copies of the order and will from Cook County which has convinced this court to grant the petition. The court asks if anyone is appearing to object to the petition. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Nov-04-98, admitted by the Circuit Court of Cook, Illinois on Apr-09-2021, and admitted to probate by this court on Jan-24-2022. Jonathan Lee is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Feb-07-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Dec-08-2021 Continued To Jan-24-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Nov-24-2021 Continued To Dec-08-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Renee Schaible, Esq. for Jonathan Lee, Petitioner;
No other appearances in this matter.

The Court states that an authenticated copy of the will is needed, that the Court is in receipt of a copy of the will, that the copy that was provided is certified, and that this Court requires a copy of the will that contains an original certification. Brief discussions are held. Ms. Schaible states that page two of the order from Cook County states that the will is admitted to probate. The Court notes that the proper document(s) is/are needed so that this court can open a will file.

At the conclusion of discussions, the Petition for Probate and for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed is continued to Wednesday, December 8, 2021, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Schaible is to provide a copy of the will with an orginal certification.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Matter not reported.
